prose.en: Providers MUST supply evidence to all necessary assessors of the effectiveness of the measures that have been implemented to meet FedRAMP Practices; this evidence is the result of validation.

note.en: For example, after verifying that firewalls are configured to block traffic following IVV-CSO-SEI (Supply Evidence of Implementation), the provider would validate that traffic is actually being blocked and supply evidence of that validation to assessors (such as by allowing them to see metrics on the traffic that is blocked vs not).
